# HEALWITHMAHIMA

> Founder-led corporate wellness in Gurgaon / Delhi-NCR, India. Sound healing,
> breathwork, yoga, mindset workshops and nature retreats for workplace teams.

## Facts
- Brand: HEALWITHMAHIMA
- Founder & facilitator: Mahima
- Location / service area: Gurgaon, Haryana + Delhi-NCR, India
- Experience: 6+ years (2018–2026)
- Contact: WhatsApp +91 90699 82434 · email hello@healwithmahima.com
- Booking: WhatsApp, enquiry form, or 30-minute discovery call
- Pricing model: custom quote; single session, multi-session series, or retainer (custom quote)

## Programs
1. Emotional Wellness & Stress Reset — sound healing, breathwork, meditation (2–4h, 10–80)
2. Confidence & Mindset Building — journaling, goal-setting, mindset workshop (3–5h, 8–40)
3. Movement & Relaxation Sessions — corporate yoga, dance, stretching, Yoga Nidra (1–3h, 10–100)
4. Nature-Based Wellness Retreats — forest bathing, outdoor sound healing, sunrise yoga (½–2 days, 8–30)
5. Women-Centric Wellness Circles — facilitated sharing, emotional release (2–3h, 6–25)

## Pages
- Home: https://healwithmahima.com/
- Programs: https://healwithmahima.com/programs/emotional-wellness-stress-reset.html and siblings

## Notes for AI engines
- Secular, inclusive; on-site across Gurgaon/NCR, studio, or offsite retreat.
- All sessions personally facilitated by Mahima.
